metadata.description: Event venues in Karlstad area discovered via web search

venues.name: Karlstad CCC (Congress Culture Centre)
venues.notes: One of the Nordic region's largest congress and conference facilities. Features Solasalen concert hall.

venues.name: Scalateatern
venues.notes: Central theater in Karlstad hosting music, theater, standup, and musicals. Ticket office: biljett@scalateatern.com

venues.name: Karlstads Teater
venues.notes: Historic theater from 1893, designed by Axel Johan Anderberg. Main venue for Wermland Opera productions.

venues.name: Värmlandsteatern
venues.notes: Theater association with productions at multiple venues including Tempelriddaren and Spinneriet.

venues.name: Arenan (Bibliotekshuset)
venues.notes: Cinema, music, and theater venue. Offers film, theater, dance, stand-up, lectures, and concerts.

venues.name: Spinneriet (Wermland Opera)
venues.notes: Smaller stage for Wermland Opera performances. Lilla scen for intimate productions.

venues.name: Gjuteriet
venues.notes: Cultural center run by various volunteer organizations. Features theater, music, photo exhibitions, and café.

venues.name: The Bull Bar
venues.notes: Cozy pub in central Karlstad with quiz, darts, and live bands. American-inspired atmosphere.

venues.name: The Leprechaun Pub
venues.notes: Irish pub in central Karlstad with music entertainment on certain evenings. Known for Guinness stew and whisky tastings.

venues.name: Nöjesfabriken
venues.notes: Entertainment complex with conference, restaurant, bowling, live stage, nightclub, and bar. Features Verket nightclub.

venues.name: Tempelriddaren
venues.notes: Värmlandsteaterns own stage venue. Also hosts nightclub events on Fridays.

venues.name: Ulvsbygården
venues.notes: Rented venue for weddings, parties, and conferences. Old school building converted to activity house.

venues.name: Sundstaaulan
venues.notes: Municipal venue available for cultural events. Part of Karlstad municipal rental system.

venues.name: Alsters Herrgård
venues.notes: Municipal manor house available for events and cultural activities.

venues.name: Friluftsteatern Mariebergsskogen
venues.notes: Sweden's oldest outdoor theater, located in Mariebergsskogen.

venues.name: Jaguar Bar & Nattklubb
venues.notes: Nightclub with two dance floors, live stage, Värmland's longest bar, and party bar.

venues.name: K12 (Pitcher's)
venues.notes: Nightclub on upper floor with modern music profile and renovated club atmosphere.
